settings.heading: 30-day money-back guarantee
settings.row_content: We stand behind the Pawly Ball. If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase, you have 30 days from the date of delivery to request a full refund. The product must be in its original packaging and in unused or gently used condition.

settings.heading: How to start a return
settings.row_content: To initiate a return, simply email us at hello@getpawly.com with your order number and reason for return. We'll respond within 24 hours with instructions. Please do not ship items back without contacting us first.

settings.heading: Return shipping costs
settings.row_content: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer. We recommend using a tracked shipping method, as we cannot process refunds for items lost in transit. Once we receive and inspect your return, we'll process your refund within 5-7 business days.

settings.heading: Refund method
settings.row_content: Refunds are issued to your original payment method (credit card, PayPal, or Apple Pay). Please allow 5-7 business days for the refund to appear on your statement after we've confirmed your return.

settings.heading: Damaged or defective items
settings.row_content: If your Pawly Ball arrives damaged or defective, contact us immediately at hello@getpawly.com with photos of the issue. We'll send a replacement at no extra cost — no return needed.
